# External Docs

**Purpose:** Define the scope and naming rules for external handoff docs that `spio` shares with sibling Styio repositories.

**Last updated:** 2026-04-23

## Scope

1. Keep external compiler dependency material under `for-styio/`.
2. Keep package-manager-owned contracts in `docs/governance/`, `docs/registry/`, or `contracts/`.

## Naming Rules

1. Use `for-<repo>/` for sibling-repository handoff collections.
2. Regenerate [INDEX.md](./INDEX.md) after changes.

## Inventory

See [INDEX.md](./INDEX.md).
